svg.title: DocVision OCR — system architecture
svg.desc: Two-column architecture diagram. Left column shows the primary request pipeline from user through Gradio, FastAPI, Orchestrator, four agents, and Report agent. Right column shows supporting infrastructure: Groq API with fallback, two-layer cache, FAISS index, and observability.

g.text: 7 tabs · chat, insights, RAG debug, export
